headline: Inflation Data, FedEx, Micron, KB Home, Darden, and More to Watch This Week
summary: Paychex, Trip.com, and McCormick will also report earnings. Economic date this week include the Fed’s preferred inflation gauge and new-home sales.

headline: FedEx Corp (FDX)’s Bold Dividend Move Amid a Freight Spin-Off
summary: FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX) is one of the best long-term stocks to invest in according to Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust. The stock has gained more than 43% year-to-date and returned more than 86% over the past year. On June 9, FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX) announced a 5% increase in its annual dividend rate, following adjustments […]

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Says Hormuz Closed But New Talks To Start; Nvidia, SpaceX Are Stocks To Watch
summary: Iran said it's closed the Strait of Hormuz but new peace talks are set to start Sunday. Nvidia and SpaceX are stocks to watch.
